name: fuji-cull
subtitle: Cull Fuji cards straight off the camera

apps.name: fuji-cull
apps.subtitle: Cull Fuji cards straight off the camera
apps.localizedDescription: Connect a Fuji camera in USB card-reader mode and cull the card without importing: instant timeline of every shot, full-resolution viewing on demand, video playback (4:2:0 and 4:2:2), keep/reject decisions, and Immich-aware import of the keepers.

versions.localizedDescription: First sideload release: PTP indexing, virtualized 24k-shot timeline, mpv video playback, client-side posters, date scrubber.
